title: actinostachys trilateralis
intro: Actinostachys trilateralis, also known as the Australian basket fern, is a type of fern that belongs to the family Osmundaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Actinostachys trilateralis include the potential treatment of various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Actinostachys trilateralis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a versatile and accessible natural remedy.
